note: Trimmed store-menu response (GET www.subway.com/api/store-menu/{locationId}?locale=en-us, header authorization:Bearer <guest JWT>). Store 26771-0 (Chicago, 35 W Van Buren St.) captured live 2026-07-08. Items live at .categories[].masterProducts[].products[]. Sizes for the same sandwich share one masterProduct (e.g. 'B.M.T.®') and are disambiguated by product.buildName: 'Footlong' vs "6''" (also buildTypeId 2 vs 1) at different prices — not by product name, which is identical for both sizes. Confirmed per-store price variance: this store's Footlong B.M.T. is 11.89, vs 11.99 seen at a different Chicago store (56071-0) during discovery.
